name: tpl-content-publish
description: Content Publishing Pipeline — research topic, write blog post and social variants, publish to CMS, schedule social posts. Replace CMS externalUrl with your provider (e.g. Contentful: https://api.contentful.com/spaces/{spaceId}/entries). Replace social scheduler externalUrl with your provider (e.g. Buffer: https://api.bufferapp.com/1/updates/create.json).

steps.notifyMsg: Content published: "{{steps.research-topic.output.suggested_title}}" — CMS URL: {{steps.publish-cms.output.post_url}}. Scheduled for {{publish_date}}. Social posts queued: {{steps.schedule-social.output.scheduled_count}} platforms.
CMS publish failed for "{{steps.research-topic.output.suggested_title}}". Status: {{steps.publish-cms.output.status}}. Error: {{steps.publish-cms.output.error}}. Manual intervention required.
